case_title: DOUGLAS HIROSHI PARK VS. COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARK, DOUGLAS HIROSHI ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-04-2018 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS).
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 10-01-18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED OCT-30-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 12/07/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,400.00 FILED BY PARK, DOUGLAS HIROSHI AS TO DEFENDANT COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-02-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED AUG-21-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-02-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-02-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN (506). APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF DOUGLAS HIROSHI PARK. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-02-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-04-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF DOUGLAS HIROSHI PARK. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. THE SIGNATURE ON THE CERTIFIED MAIL RECEIPT DOES NOT MATCH THE NAME OF THE AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS. THE COURT WILL RETAIN EXHIBITS FOR THE CONTINUED HEARING. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: GAIL GILMAN) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARK, DOUGLAS HIROSHI AS TO DEFENDANT COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-04-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-04-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF DOUGLAS HIROSHI PARK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HOUSING PARTNERSHIP IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY CHERISH MARIANO, PROPERTY SUPERVISOR. PLIANTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARK, DOUGLAS HIROSHI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP IN A CIVIL CASE THE PLAINTIFF MUST PROVE THE DEFENDANT CAUSED HIS HARM. HERE, MR. PARK DOES NOT KNOW HOW THE POWER TO HIS FREEZER WAS TURNED OFF, AND HE HAS NO DIRECT EVIDENCE THAT DEFENDANT'S EMPLOYEE TURNED IT OFF. ACCORDINGLY I CANNOT AWARD HIM DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
